seoTitle: Dorrigo vs Dorrigo Mountain — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dorrigo and Dorrigo Mountain. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dorrigo vs Dorrigo Mountain: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dorrigo and Dorrigo Mountain.
heading: Dorrigo vs Dorrigo Mountain — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dorrigo, New South Wales and Dorrigo Mountain, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dorrigo has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Dorrigo Mountain (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dorrigo or Dorrigo Mountain safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dorrigo has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Dorrigo Mountain scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dorrigo scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Dorrigo Mountain scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dorrigo or Dorrigo Mountain?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dorrigo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.57% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
